purpose: Expand the MAPK14 development-train matrix after the 80-active/80-decoy matrix failed fixed-candidate repeated-CV stability.

panel_selection.active_rule: include every active row in the frozen train split
panel_selection.decoy_rule: retain every existing 80a80d train decoy, then shuffle remaining train decoys after ligand_id sorting with Python random.Random and admit the first rows from previously unused split_group_id values until 348 decoys are present

ligand_preparation.rdkit_embedding: ETKDGv3 with explicit hydrogens and useRandomCoords=true
ligand_preparation.optimization: MMFF94 when parameters are available, otherwise UFF; maximum 500 iterations; non-convergence warnings retained
ligand_preparation.pdbqt: Meeko 0.7.1; warning SDF rows included; failures retained and matrix execution blocked until resolved

docking.reuse_boundary: Only exact existing e32 receptor-ligand-seed results with matching receptor, ligand PDBQT, Vina protocol, and score hashes may be reused. No e64 diagnostic value may enter the matrix.

next_gate: All 696 selected ligands must have audited PDBQT files before a remote e32 docking bundle is created. Development-validation and test remain unavailable.
interpretation_boundary: This preregistration authorizes deterministic train-panel expansion, preparation of 536 new train ligands, and later CPU docking under the unchanged e32 protocol. It does not authorize validation/test access, enrichment calculation before matrix admission, selective score replacement, affinity or activity claims, QUBO benefit, or quantum advantage.
